title: Arizona Chimney Pros – SEO Page Data

fields.label: Slug
fields.name: slug
fields.instructions: URL slug. Format: {service-slug}-{city-slug}. Lowercase, hyphens only.

fields.label: Page Title (H1)
fields.name: title
fields.instructions: The main H1 shown on the page. Service + city, high-intent.
fields.placeholder: Gas Fireplace Repair in Phoenix, AZ

fields.label: City
fields.name: city
fields.instructions: City name exactly as it appears in the URL and title.

fields.label: State
fields.name: state
fields.instructions: State abbreviation or full name.

fields.label: Service
fields.name: service
fields.instructions: Primary service offered on this page.

fields.label: Appliance Type
fields.name: appliance_type
fields.instructions: Type of appliance this page targets.

fields.label: Fuel Type
fields.name: fuel_type
fields.instructions: Fuel type this page targets.

fields.label: Page Type
fields.name: page_type
fields.instructions: The strategic type of this landing page.

fields.label: Price Range
fields.name: price_range
fields.instructions: Typical price range for this service. Used in content and schema.

fields.label: Primary Keyword
fields.name: primary_keyword
fields.instructions: The exact keyword this page targets. Used in meta title.

fields.label: Secondary Keywords
fields.name: secondary_keywords
fields.instructions: Semicolon-separated secondary keywords to weave into content.

fields.label: Nearby Cities
fields.name: nearby_cities
fields.instructions: Comma or semicolon separated nearby cities for internal linking and local signals.

fields.label: Local Notes
fields.name: local_notes
fields.instructions: Editor notes about this city/market. Used as context for content generation — NOT shown on page.

fields.label: Meta Title
fields.name: meta_title
fields.instructions: SEO meta title. Max 60 characters.
fields.placeholder: Gas Fireplace Repair in Phoenix AZ | Arizona Chimney Pros

fields.label: Meta Description
fields.name: meta_description
fields.instructions: SEO meta description. Max 155 characters.

fields.label: Page Intro
fields.name: intro
fields.instructions: Opening paragraph(s) of the page. 80-120 words. Sets context and contains primary keyword.

fields.label: Local Section
fields.name: local_section
fields.instructions: City-specific paragraph. What makes this market unique — climate, home styles, common issues in this city.

fields.label: Signs / Symptoms Section
fields.name: signs_section
fields.instructions: Common warning signs and symptoms the homeowner should watch for. Use a list format.

fields.label: Pricing Section
fields.name: pricing_section
fields.instructions: Transparent pricing overview for this service in this city. Builds trust.

fields.label: Process Section
fields.name: process_section
fields.instructions: How we actually do the work: inspection, diagnosis, repair, final testing. Methodical and trustworthy.

fields.label: Trust Section
fields.name: trust_section
fields.instructions: Credibility block: years in Arizona, jobs handled, safety focus, licensed and insured.

fields.label: FAQ 1 – Question
fields.name: faq_1_q
fields.instructions: First FAQ question. Should target a common search query.

fields.label: FAQ 1 – Answer
fields.name: faq_1_a
fields.instructions: Answer to FAQ 1. 50-90 words.

fields.label: CTA Headline
fields.name: cta_headline
fields.instructions: The closing call-to-action headline. Should feel urgent but not pushy.
fields.placeholder: Ready to Fix Your Gas Fireplace in Phoenix?

fields.label: CTA Text
fields.name: cta_text
fields.instructions: Supporting CTA paragraph. 2-3 sentences. Reinforces trust and urgency.

fields.label: Internal Links
fields.name: internal_links
fields.instructions: Semicolon-separated internal link paths (typically 6-8 per page). Use the flat /{service-city-slug}/ format — one URL segment, lowercase, hyphens, no spaces. Generator merges 3 editorial picks from Claude with 5 auto-injected peer links for hub-and-spoke topology.

fields.label: Schema.org JSON-LD
fields.name: schema_json
fields.instructions: Locally-generated JSON-LD @graph for this page (LocalBusiness + Service + WebPage + BreadcrumbList + FAQPage). The WP template dumps this raw inside a <script type="application/ld+json"> tag in <head>. DO NOT hand-edit — regenerate via generate.py so the schema stays in sync with CSV + content.

description: Structured content fields for Arizona Chimney Pros programmatic SEO pages.
